hero.title: Portfolio
hero.subtitle: Welcome to my portfolio, a space dedicated to presenting my projects and galleries.

home.name: Benjamin Balayre
home.welcome: Welcome to my website, a space dedicated to discovering my background and passions. You will find information about my professional, personal and associative projects.
home.education_desc: Always passionate about innovation and new technologies, I chose to pursue a degree in digital engineering at ISEP.
home.experience_desc: My goal: to consolidate my expertise in the digital field while understanding its challenges to actively contribute to tomorrow's innovations.
home.skills_desc: An overview of the tools and fields I navigate daily, from visual creation to digital product development.
home.latest_project_desc: During my academic exchange in Oslo, I spent <1>4 months in Norway</1>. This video captures the highlights and breathtaking landscapes of this experience.
home.portfolio_preview_desc: Passionate about visuals, I share my photography portfolio and cinematic travel films here. Discover my latest projects and visual universe.
home.associative_preview_desc: My student life is deeply shaped by associative commitments. From presiding over an FPV drone club to managing the school’s media association (ISEP Live), explore my projects.

video_editing.title: Video Editing
video_editing.description: I master editing software like Adobe Premiere Pro and Final Cut Pro. I have directed, edited, and color-graded numerous videos for personal and associative projects.
video_editing.imageDescription: Timeline of a video editing project

graphic_design.title: Graphic Design
graphic_design.description: Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop, I regularly create visual identities, logos, posters, and illustrations.

photo_editing.title: Photo Editing
photo_editing.description: I use Adobe Lightroom Classic and Photoshop for the development and advanced retouching of my photographs, including crafting custom presets.

associative.title: Associative Experience
associative.hero_desc: Associative engagement has been a cornerstone of my education. Find details of my involvements and the projects I led during my studies.

iseplive.title: ISEP Live
iseplive.presentation_desc: ISEP Live is the school's media association. Our 25-member team covers all of student life and major events (Integration Weekend, Ski Week, etc.) through photography and video.
iseplive.iseplife_desc: The association internally develops and maintains the ISEP Life mobile app, a true hub for campus life: agendas, student directories, association news, and media galleries.
iseplive.path_desc:
I joined ISEP Live in 2021 to improve my photography and audiovisual skills alongside other enthusiasts.

As Vice-President in 2022, I coordinated creation departments, significantly strengthening my project management and teamwork skills.

Continuing this commitment, I took on the presidency in 2023. This foundational experience taught me to lead a 25-person team, oversee the art direction of our productions, and structure our overall development.

vizion.title: Student Council: Vizion
vizion.presentation_desc:
The Student Council (BDE) is the central body of associative life. The Vizion team, with its 40 members, set the pace for the student year with its events and projects.

I mainly worked within the Creation department, ensuring the visual identity of our term (logos, social media communication, apparel).
vizion.path_desc:
Being part of a Student Council is a tremendous experience in high-pressure teamwork. In the Creation department, I expressed my creativity while meeting strict deadlines and concrete communication needs.

This human adventure gave me a real vision of event management, but more importantly, it built invaluable adaptability and collaboration skills.

isepdrone.title: ISEP Drone
isepdrone.presentation_desc:
First Person View (FPV) flying allows the pilot to steer a drone by seeing exactly what the onboard camera films through a video headset.

I helped found the ISEP Drone club in 2021 with a group of enthusiasts. Our mission: to democratize this technical discipline through assembly workshops, simulator coaching, and outdoor flight sessions.
isepdrone.path_desc:
As a founding member, I first shaped the visual identity of our new structure and managed digital communication to attract new members.

This dynamic naturally led me to the club presidency in 2023. This exciting term allowed me to organize internal competitions and run our weekly sessions, granting me solid experience in leading small teams and technical teaching.

benevolence.title: Benevolence
benevolence.desc: Art prints from my travels, available on canvas, aluminium, acrylic or paper. Each piece is a limited edition designed to elevate your space.

external_portfolio.title: Photo & Video Portfolio
external_portfolio.description: Discover all my photo and video projects on my dedicated portfolio website.

capgemini.title: Intern Consultant – Capgemini Invent (frog)
capgemini.description: Internship within the Frog Customer Data & Tech service. Design of innovative strategies and support for large-scale digital transformations. Consulting missions for general management on strategy, organization, and operational efficiency.

sidetrade.title: Intern Data Analyst – Sidetrade
sidetrade.description: Internship in the Datalake Ingest team. Analysis of datalake data, creation of strategic dashboards (Power BI), and collaboration with R&D and Product teams in an English-speaking environment.

freelance.title: Freelancer – Photographer & Videographer
freelance.description: Production of photo and video content for events and professional projects. Complete management of customer relations, shooting, editing, and artistic direction.

microsoft.title: Observation Internship – Microsoft
microsoft.description: Observation internship within Microsoft, allowing discovery of software engineering professions, exploration of the digital world, and confirmation of orientation towards technologies and innovation.

oslomet.title: OsloMet (Norway) – International Academic Semester
oslomet.description: A semester abroad focused on Data Science and Artificial Intelligence. An academic immersion that allowed me to study business intelligence systems with an international approach.

isep_ing.title: ISEP – Engineering Cycle (Paris)
isep_ing.description: Digital engineering curriculum with a specialization in Business Intelligence (BI) and data architecture. Comprehensive training in IT professions: from software design to IS management.

inha.title: Inha University (South Korea) – International Academic Semester
inha.description: An enriching first semester abroad, featuring courses in system programming, leadership, electronics, and Korean language. Culturally, one of my most impactful experiences.

isep_cii.title: ISEP – Integrated International Cycle
isep_cii.description: Integrated preparatory classes. Intensive training in mathematics, digital sciences, electronics, and international environments.
